title: Ex-Don’s Son Under Lens After Lamborghini Drift Stunt In Bengaluru Goes Viral; Vehicle Seized
description: As per reports, the authorities traced the vehicle to the home of Ricky Rai, the son of the late former underworld figure Muthappa Rai. As per the video, the Lamborghini was seen performing drifts and high-speed turns, allegedly endangering public safety.
